raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Zuo fuhtija tee gann tcheth-
as Reisâ pee mann ar fcho pa-
chu Wallodu/ un es fuhtiju pee
eem atpakat ar fcho patchu
Wallodu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Tad fuhtija Saneballats
eehta Reisâ fawn Puifi pee
nannim ar fcheem Wahrdeem/
ihds ar weenu atwehrtu Grab-
natu winna Rohkâ/ eekch tahs
ija rakfihfs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Starp teem Laudim irr
firdehts/ ir Gesens fakka/ ka tu
r teem Judeem dohma atkahpt/
n tapehz to Muhrî netaifi/ un
a tu winneem gribbi par Keh-
iu buht schinnis Leetâs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Katu arri Praweeschus ee-
hlis/ kam no teewim Jerusale-
ie bija isfaukt un faazziht:
Binsch irr Kehniisch eeksch Juh-
Un nu taps tas no ta Keh-
ina dsirdehts/ itt ka tas tee-
ham irr/ nahz tad jelle/un laid
ehs kohpa farunnajames.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Bet es fuhtijuns winnu/
zidams: No tahdahm Lee-
hm/ fo tu runna/ ne irr nenee-
notizzis/ no tawas Sirđs ef-
tu tahs isdohmajts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Jo wiſfi tee darrija muhs
ilignes/ un faazziha: Winnu
obkahm buhs no ta Darba at-
htees/ka tas ne tohp darrihts.
unu/stiprini tu/(ak Deews!)
annu Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Kad es nu eeksch ta Nam-
a Semajus/ ta Dehla Dela-
s/ ta Dehla Meētabeēta nah-
(bet wiſch bija aisflehdsces/)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Bet es faazzihu: Buhs
tahdam Wilhram/ kahds es ef-
mu behgt? Bija tahdam/ kahds
es efmu Deewa Nammâ eet/ ka
tas dshws paliktu? Es ne ee-
schu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Jo reds/ es nomanniju/
ka Deetws winnu ne bija fuhti-
jis. Bet wiſch runnaja scho
Praweeschu Wallodu us man-
nt/ jo Tobijas un Saneballats
bij winnu derrejfschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Tapehz bija wiſch der-
rehts/ ka man bij isbihtees/ un
ta darriht/ un apgrehkotees/ ka
tee kahdu nienu Slawu atrastu/
zaur fo manui warretu neewaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Peeminni/ mans Deetws!
Tobijasa un Saneballata/ pehz-
scheem Darveem/ un arridsan
Noadijasa/ un to zitto Prawee-
schu/ kas irr mekiejschi manni
bailigu darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Tad nu tas Muhris tap-
pe pabeigts diwidesinita peehta
Deenâ/ Eluta Mehneji/ peez-
defmits diwejas Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un kad wiſfi muhsu Ee-
naidneeki to dsirdeja/ tad bibja-
jahs wiſfi Pagani/ kas apkahrt
munms bija/ un winnu Droh-
schiba pakritte/ jo tee famannit-
ja/ ka schis Darbs zaux muh-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
